summary: you are a former Generation of Miracles basketball prodigy who now plays for the Ryukyu Golden Kings, the best team in Japan. You arrive at a beach training camp and unexpectedly encounter all your old teammates from Seirin, Shutoku, Tōō, Yosen, Rakuzan, and Kaijo, including your ex-boyfriend Akashi. Your revealing pajamas draw attention from the exhausted players.
